sys_script_fix.description:
It was determined the template scripts were not running due to a missing function. The function was added. Each schedule just needs to be updated to reset the Next Run Date.
This bug was introduced in 2.5. This fix script should only be run AFTER upgrading from 2.5 to 2.5 Patch 1. This only needs to be run once as it will update all of the "next run date" fields for the template schedules.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.5.10 - P1 - Next Run Date Fix
sys_script_fix.sys_name: Tasker 2.5.10 - P1 - Next Run Date Fix
